case_title: FAITH CHRISTINA FOWLER VS. MICHAEL A GALLIN

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR MAR-11-2024; JUDGMENT DEBTOR MICHAEL A GALLIN FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00. PLAINTIFF FAITH CHRISTINA FOWLER IS PRESENT. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-04-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOWLER, FAITH CHRISTINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALLIN, MICHAEL A $1,761.48 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,851.48, PLAINTIFF MET HER BURDEN OF PROOF THAT SHE PAID $1761.48 TO PASS THE SMOG TEST. PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED THAT AMOUNT PLUSE COURT COSTS OF $90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT GALLIN, MICHAEL A HEARING SET FOR FEB-08-2024 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF FEB-08-2024 IS CONTINUED TO MAR-11-2024 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. PLAINTIFF FAITH CHRISTINA FOWLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHAEL A GALLIN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT - RETURNED UNSERVED. DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE ATTACHED FROM SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF. REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS AS TO DEFENDANT GALLIN, MICHAEL A
